channel.title: Juan Sebastian Quintero
channel.description: Recent content on Juan Sebastian Quintero

item.title: Welcome to my blog
item.description: Thanks for visiting me! I will be publishing something very soon 🤓

item.title: Intro
item.description: print("hello world 👋") My name is Juan and I work as a software developer. I have had the chance to work in several stacks, specially on backend. I decided to open this blog so I can share opinions, thoughs and experiences along my journey in the tech industry. I feel that writing about this stuff will help me to clarify my thougths and have clearer concepts about what I learn. I hope it can also help others 😃

item.title: Projects
item.description: Nothing here yet 😛 come back later
